messages.content: I am a wandering merchant, peddling wares across these mystical lands. What catches your eye, traveler?
Potions of healing, enchanted scrolls, and the finest steel blades this side of the mountains. Each item carries a tale of its own.
Three gold pieces for a standard healing draught. But for you, my friend, I could make it two. Times are tough, after all.
Ah, this place? Once prosperous, now fallen on hard times. The old mines ran dry, and the young folk left seeking fortune elsewhere. Still, good people remain.
Keep your wits about you in the northern woods. Strange creatures lurk there, and many a brave soul has ventured in but never returned. Best stick to the paths.
